name: Special
description: A straightforward Tediore SMG with no standout gimmick, but steadier handling than many of its peers thanks to the fitted Dahl muzzle. It is rarely the best-in-slot choice for damage or reload tricks, yet it remains a dependable all-rounder if you value lower recoil over flashier traits.
notes: It only appears at green rarity or higher and drops randomly from suitable loot sources.
